creator: josef.moellers@pdb.siemens.de
text:
When trying to boot the installation CD or the kern.flp image, the
boot sequence is aborted with the following screen info:
int=0xd err=0 efl=0x30002 eip=0xf274
eax=0x0f09 ebx=0xfaa0 ecx=0x0001 edx=0x9fa09
esi=0x0270 edi=0x00d1 ebp=0x03dc esp=0x03d4
cs=0xf000 ds=0x9f80 es=0x9f80 ss=0x9b7d fs=0x0040 gs=0x0000
cs:ep=0f 01 54 08 2e 0f 01 1e - c2 f1 0f 20 c0 0c 01 0f
No other information is shown on the screen.

It's not critical, because there are no official plans to support
FBSD, I just want to add FBSD to the list of installable OSs.

Fix: 

None.
How-To-Repeat: Reproducable with CD boot and floppy boot.
